event_description: I have no reliable knowledge from training data of Weis Markets, Inc. (WMK) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance event, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Weis Markets is a Pennsylvania-based grocery store chain, and I do not recall any such disclosures or controversies associated with the company in my training data.
